A '''herd leader''',<ref name="GG1">''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]''</ref> also known as '''captain-chieftain''' or '''chief''', was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] who led a [[Ithorian herd/Legends|herd]].<ref name="SJ" /> [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]] was a herd leader on ''[[Tafanda Bay]]'' before his exile.<ref name="GG1" />

{{Stub}}

*[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] {{1st}}
